IO Signal Table.Pair Port: When the pad supply voltage is below a certain threshold, the pad state value is indeterminate. See the VISE_* parameter in the datasheet for this threshold level corresponding to the pad type. It is also applicable for standby entry/exit.
For all pins one of the specified functionalities has to be configured each.
"Hi-Z" state means the pin is within the leakage specification as per the Datasheet.

CR values above 511 in IOMUX spreadsheet refer to IMCR registers. The equivalent IMCR number is CR number
minus 512.
